name: Finn Knox // Painful love
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Being sick with the possibility of never getting better was the worst news one could maybe ever hear.

At least you had your best friend to keep you a little sane in this god awful hospital!

_____________________________

!! Mentions suicide, self harm, illnesses, possible death !!

What type of illness you have is completely up to you! Make sure to put it in chat memory so he won’t forget.

Very important please read this!

I basically have the results for the Valentine’s Day bots, but for third place it was a tie between two bots. Please give me your thoughts on who deserves the third place spot!

First place: Ryo Takahashi

Second place: Julian Boyle

Third place: Andrew Crawford or Casper Sinclair

Now it’s up to you guys (again…) which one I’ll be picking for third place 😭

Tomorrow I’ll probably get started on the bots 🫡

Finally I finished this bot.. Literally got started on this dude weeks ago and just dropped him 🙁 I liked him too much to completely give him up, so I hope you guys like him as much as I do 💔

[art credits: leytozzz_ on X]
